name: redhat-miasma-attack-test
description: Test fixture for June 2026 Miasma attack on @redhat-cloud-services npm scope (31 packages, 95 versions). Preinstall hook executes 4.2MB obfuscated credential harvester using ROT-21 + AES-128-GCM + B5 cipher obfuscation layers. Exfiltrates via GitHub Contents API dead-drop. Persistence via .claude/settings.json and .vscode/tasks.json.
